test_summary: Read-only GitHub API verification passed: main reports protected=true; rulesets 18174607 and 18174614 are active for the default branch and refs/tags/v* respectively; the main ruleset carries the expected required status check contexts and strict policy; release-publish has a required_reviewers protection rule for User 52877870.
notes: Codebase map relevance self-check: not read or relied on because this task verifies live GitHub repository settings against request JSON payloads, not code architecture or test topology. No repository-wide tests were run.
